message:
feat(tldr): add fuzzy search and filtering to flywheel tool grid

Implements comprehensive search functionality for the /tldr page tool grid
using Fuse.js for intelligent fuzzy matching across multiple fields.

## New Components

### ToolSearchBar
- Glass morphism styled search input with violet accent on focus
- Real-time fuzzy search across tool name, shortName, description, tech stack
- Keyboard shortcuts: "/" to focus search, Escape to clear
- Results count display showing "X of Y tools"
- Clear button appears when query is active
- Keyboard hint badge showing "/" shortcut

### EmptySearchState
- Friendly empty state when no tools match search query
- Shows the attempted search term in quotes
- Suggests example searches ("session", "memory", "search")
- Clear search button to reset

## Technical Implementation

### Fuse.js Configuration
```typescript
keys: [
  { name: "name", weight: 2 },        // Highest priority
  { name: "shortName", weight: 2 },   // Abbreviations matter
  { name: "whatItDoes", weight: 1.5 },
  { name: "whyItsUseful", weight: 1 },
  { name: "techStack", weight: 1 },
  { name: "keyFeatures", weight: 0.8 },
]
threshold: 0.3  // Balanced fuzzy matching
ignoreLocation: true  // Match anywhere in string
```

### Features
- Filters both Core and Supporting tool sections simultaneously
- AnimatePresence for smooth enter/exit animations on filter
- Maintains expand/collapse state through filtering
- Responsive design with proper mobile spacing
- Reduced motion support for accessibility

## Keyboard Navigation
- "/" focuses search from anywhere on page (when not in input)
- Escape clears search and blurs input
- Standard tab navigation through results
